title: Social Media Coordinator
description: Target is seeking a Social Media Coordinator to manage our community engagement and brand presence remotely. You'll create content, respond to customer inquiries, and track analytics across social platforms. This role offers the opportunity to connect with millions of Target guests and build authentic brand relationships.
responsibilities: Create and schedule engaging social media content across platforms (Instagram, TikTok, Facebook, Twitter)
Respond to customer inquiries and comments; provide excellent customer service on social channels
Monitor social media trends and competitor activity; recommend content strategies
Track social metrics and performance; prepare reports on engagement and reach
Collaborate with marketing and merchandising teams to align social content with campaigns

requirements.education: Bachelor's degree in Marketing, Communications, or related field
